summary: Iteration 18 - Bug Fixes Testing Complete. All 22 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed. All 4 bug fixes verified working: 1) Option chain instruments dropdown returns 9 instruments in object format with label/exchange fields, 2) Auto-refresh changed to 1s, 3) Brokers have descriptions, 4) MCX commodities added to market ticker and option chain.

issues: 404 error for favicon - not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: OPTION_INSTRUMENTS in option_chain_service.py correctly includes all 9 instruments with type (index/commodity) and exchange fields
INDEX_KEYS in upstox_service.py and ws_market_data.py correctly include MCX_FO|CRUDEOIL, MCX_FO|GOLD, MCX_FO|SILVER
OptionChain.js auto-refresh interval correctly set to 1000ms (1 second) at line 55
MarketTicker.js correctly displays 7 indices including MCX commodities with proper labels
App.js initialState includes MCX default values for crudeoil, gold, silver
BROKER_INFO in broker_manager.py includes description field for all brokers
test_credentials: None required - uses public preview URL
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 bug fixes verified. All 4 issues fixed: 1) Option chain instruments API now returns object with 9 instruments (6 index + 3 MCX commodities), each with label and exchange fields. 2) Auto-refresh changed from 2s to 1s. 3) Brokers have descriptions. 4) MCX commodities (CRUDE OIL, GOLD, SILVER) displayed in market ticker with values. Version is 2.0.0.

option_chain_instruments_api.description: GET /api/option-chain/instruments returns 9 instruments in object format
option_chain_instruments_api.api_format: object with label, exchange, type, lot_size, strike_step, base_price fields

brokers_description_field.description: GET /api/brokers/list returns brokers with description field
sample_descriptions: Popular discount broker with fast API

instruments_mcx_support.description: GET /api/instruments includes MCX commodities with exchange field

market_ticker_mcx.description: Market ticker shows CRUDE OIL, GOLD, SILVER with values

mocked_apis_note: Option chain data is SIMULATED (Black-Scholes) when no broker connected - this is expected behavior for paper trading mode.
